ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "max_temp_c" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "mean_temp_c" REAL /* Mean temperature in Celsius */,
  "min_temp_c" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "dew_point_c" REAL /* Dew Point in Celsius */,
  "mean_dew_point_c" REAL /* Mean Dew Point in Celsius */,
  "min_dew_point_c" REAL /* Minimum Dew Point in Celsius */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "max_visibility_km" REAL /* Maximum visibility in kilometers */,
  "mean_visibility_km" REAL /* Mean visibility in kilometers */,
  "min_visibility_km" REAL /* Minimum visibility in kilometers */,
  "max_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in km/h */,
  "mean_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Mean wind speed in km/h */,
  "max_gust_speed_kmh" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Type of weather event (e.g., Snow, Rain, None) */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected this record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location where this record was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event type */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., Snow, Rain, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather event (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Description of the accessed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station related to this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Severe Weather, Flood Warning) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user contributing to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., researcher, analyst, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
